keyTerms.educational migration: The phenomenon of students crossing borders for higher education, constituting the largest people-to-people exchange in history
keyTerms.people-to-people diplomacy: Cultural and educational exchanges that operate below the level of official state relations
keyTerms.critical thinking transfer: The exposure of Chinese students to Western pedagogical norms of debate, questioning, and intellectual independence
keyTerms.visa restriction: Government policies that limit or complicate international student mobility, often reflecting broader geopolitical tensions
keyTerms.Columbia University: An Ivy League institution in New York City, one of the top destinations for Chinese international students
